titleStmt.title: SII 39.90: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 90. (A.R. No. 90 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA, ‘WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE THE CHŌḺA COUNTRY.’-12TH YEAR (1228 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of a water tank called Amarādichchaṉkuḍik-kāṭṭukkuḷam by the ūṟār of Viraiyāchchilai, which was a Paḍaippaṟṟu to the ūrār of Kumāttakkuḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvana cakravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku 10 2 vatu Āvaṇimātat torunāḷ kāṉanāṭāṉa virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu paṭai
ppaṟṟu viraiyāccilai Ūrāka vicainta Araiyankaḷom yiṉnāṭṭuk kumāttakakuṭi yūvaṟku nīr vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna Amarāticcaṉ kuṭikkāṭṭu
kkuḷam Uṭaikuḷappaṭṭu vayalum vatiyaḻiñcu kāṭum mentu pāḻāykiṭakkaiyil Ikkuḷattu nin vilaiyāka Ivarkaḷ marutaṅkuḷattilē pāyvitāka Iṉninku Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷ niccayitta paḻaṅkācu 10 8 I
ppaḻaṅkācu patiṉeṭṭukkum vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kumāttakkuṭiyūdevaṟku viraiyāccilai Ūrāka Icainta Araiyaṅkaṉom Ippaṭi viṟṟa Ikkuḷattil nir
pāyumiṭattuk kuḷam naṭuvākak kālāka veṭṭi pirāṉ kuḷattil vaṭakaṭaiyi kālāka veṭṭi marutaṅkuḷattil pāccik koḷvārkaḷa
ṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu nir vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kumāttakuṭi Ūravaṟku viraiyāccilai ppaṭikku maṅkala nāṭāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Uṭkoṇṭa tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku naraciṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aññūṟṟuvatevaṉ Eḻuttu
ttu Ippaṭikku poṟkaḷa nerukkipperaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Innir vilaippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūṟkaṇak
Digital edition of SII 39.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
